# Internal Support Agent -- Semantic Layer Golden Prompt Set

Comprehensive golden prompt dataset for testing a semantic search layer
or AI support copilot used by internal customer support agents.

## Order Lookup

-   Find order 7823419
-   Look up order #7823419
-   Show me details for order 7823419
-   Pull up order 7823419
-   Retrieve the order record for 7823419

## Order Lookup by Customer

-   Find orders placed by customer with email john.smith@gmail.com
-   Show all orders for phone number +1 415 555 9012
-   Get order history for customer ID CUST-8821
-   What orders has this customer placed in the last 30 days?

## Order Status Investigation

-   What is the current status of order 7823419?
-   Why is order 7823419 still in processing?
-   Show the timeline of events for order 7823419
-   When did order 7823419 move to fulfillment?
-   Has order 7823419 been shipped yet?

## Payment Investigation

-   Did payment succeed for order 7823419?
-   Show payment attempts for order 7823419
-   Why did payment fail for order 7823419?
-   Was payment captured for order 7823419?

## Logistics Investigation

-   Where is the shipment for order 7823419?
-   Show tracking events for order 7823419
-   Which courier is handling order 7823419?
-   What was the last tracking update for this order?

## Fulfillment Investigation

-   Why hasn't order 7823419 been fulfilled yet?
-   Check inventory allocation for order 7823419
-   Is the SKU in this order out of stock?
-   Which fulfillment center is assigned to order 7823419?

## Returns Investigation

-   Has the customer initiated a return for order 7823419?
-   Show return request details for order 7823419
-   What is the status of return RMA-22091?
-   Has the return pickup been scheduled?

## Refund Investigation

-   Has a refund been issued for order 7823419?
-   Show refund transactions for order 7823419
-   Why has the refund not been processed yet?
-   When was the refund initiated?

## Customer Intelligence

-   Show customer profile for CUST-8821
-   What is the customer's order history?
-   How many returns has this customer made?
-   Does this customer have previous complaints?
-   What is the loyalty tier of this customer?

## Customer ↔ Order Intersection

-   Who placed order 7823419?
-   Show the customer profile for order 7823419
-   What is the purchase history of the customer who placed order
    7823419?
-   Is the customer who placed order 7823419 a repeat buyer?
-   Has the customer who placed order 7823419 contacted support before?

## Customer Behavior

-   How many orders has this customer placed?
-   How many orders has this customer returned?
-   Show the return rate for this customer
-   Has this customer previously cancelled orders?

## Fraud Investigation

-   Is order 7823419 associated with a high-risk customer?
-   Show fraud flags for the customer who placed order 7823419
-   Does this customer have multiple accounts?
-   Have there been chargebacks from this customer?

## Cross-System Investigation

-   Give me a full investigation report for order 7823419
-   Trace order 7823419 across payment, fulfillment, and shipment
-   Explain why this order has not been delivered yet
-   Summarize everything that happened with order 7823419
-   What went wrong with this order?
